meta.title: Terms & Conditions | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Terms and conditions for use of Prayaan Capital's website and loan services.

sections.headline: 1. General Terms
sections.body: By accessing this website and using Prayaan Capital's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. They apply to all visitors, applicants, and borrowers.

sections.headline: 2. Loan Terms
sections.body: All loan products are subject to Prayaan Capital's credit policy, RBI guidelines, and the terms stated in individual loan agreements. Applying on this website does not constitute a loan offer or sanction.

sections.headline: 3. Website Usage
sections.body: You may not use this website for any unlawful purpose, to transmit harmful content, or to attempt unauthorised access to our systems.

sections.headline: 4. Disclaimers
sections.body: Information on this website is for general informational purposes only. Interest rates and product terms are indicative and subject to change. Final terms are as stated in your sanction letter.

sections.headline: 5. Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

sections.headline: 6. Dispute Resolution
sections.body: Disputes should first be raised through our Grievance Redressal mechanism. Unresolved disputes may be referred to the RBI Ombudsman as per applicable guidelines.
